certification: UNDERPOWERED (DSR 0.745 < 0.95); strongest & most robust book of the arc; forward wall is the only certifier — not promoted

params.quality_green: close > open AND close in the upper half of the week's range
params.crs_rule: take signal only if weekly RS = stock/Nifty-50 is above its own 40-week SMA
params.entry: in-range open the week after a green weekly bounce off the 44-week SMA
params.exits: half at +2R; remainder trails the 20-day SMA -4% (ratchet); stop = signal-week low; decided at the weekly close, filled Monday; 13-week cap

backtest.note: in-sample; robust plateau, 2 losing years, 2023-concentration 39%; leakage-clean. Beats 0091 and buy-and-hold. Not indicative of future results.
